defect.response_dependency: The observed Quaia photometric redshift used as the response also enters s(z_i) in the held-out design matrix.
defect.consequence: CVLPD and injection-recovery quantities are not genuinely held-out predictive statistics.

replacement_requirements: one-to-one positional cross-match to official SDSS DR16Q v4
response equals Quaia photometric redshift minus DR16Q spectroscopic redshift
SU2 scalar curve uses DR16Q spectroscopic redshift only
locked null split and injection-power calibration
explicit permutation test proving predictors are invariant to the Quaia photometric-redshift response
